_notes: Hand-curated by reading the US Core Practitioner differential (16 elements) line by line against the R4 Practitioner snapshot. Key R4 facts: identifier min=0 max=*; identifier.system/value NOT in R4 snapshot (inherited from Identifier datatype as 0..1); name min=0 max=*; name.family NOT in R4 Practitioner snapshot (inherited from HumanName as 0..1); telecom min=0; address min=0; address sub-elements NOT in R4 snapshot. The NPI slice carries two error-severity constraints (separate items). Practitioner has no USCDI annotation extensions in its differential (uscdi=0). Note: identifier.system and identifier.value explicitly set min=1 in the diff (unlike Organization); name.family also sets min=1.

drifts.description: Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. At least one identifier becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 allows a Practitioner without any identifier.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Slicing added on identifier: discriminator type=pattern, path=$this, rules=open. No slicing exists in R4 base.

Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Identifier system URI becomes mandatory when an identifier is present. R4 Practitioner snapshot does not constrain identifier sub-elements (inherited from Identifier datatype as 0..1).
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).

Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Identifier value becomes mandatory when an identifier is present. R4 Practitioner snapshot does not constrain identifier sub-elements (inherited from Identifier datatype as 0..1).
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
New slice 'NPI' added with patternIdentifier system=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/us-npi and mustSupport=true. No equivalent slice exists in R4 base.
Constraint 'us-core-16' added (severity: error): NPI must be 10 digits. Expression: value.matches('^[0-9]{10}$'). Not present in R4 base.
Constraint 'us-core-17' added (severity: error): NPI check digit must be valid (Luhn algorithm check). Not present in R4 base.
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. At least one name becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 allows a Practitioner without any name.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Family name becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 Practitioner snapshot does not constrain name sub-elements (HumanName.family is inherited as 0..1).
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Practitioner snapshot does not constrain telecom sub-elements.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Practitioner snapshot does not constrain telecom sub-elements.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Cardinality max constrained: [0..*] -> [0..4]. Address lines are limited to 4 in US Core. R4 Address.line is inherited as 0..*.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Practitioner snapshot does not constrain address sub-elements.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Practitioner snapshot does not constrain address sub-elements.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Practitioner snapshot does not constrain address sub-elements.
New binding added in target: extensible binding to http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-usps-state (US USPS state codes). R4 Practitioner does not constrain address.state with any binding.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Practitioner snapshot does not constrain address sub-elements.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Practitioner snapshot does not constrain address sub-elements.
